overall.title: Full Stack & Platform Engineer
overall.subTitle: Specializing in Distributed Systems, React Ecosystems, and Custom CMS Architectures
overall.description: Fusing robust backend engineering, distributed caching models, dynamic React frontends, and custom CMS plugins. I apply engineering-first principles across the entire stack, from low-latency databases to accessible, responsive user interfaces.
overall.featuredDescription: A complete view of custom software systems, API engines, database models, and web applications developed across multiple engineering disciplines.

swe.title: Software Engineer
swe.subTitle: Building Scalable, Highly Maintainable Software Systems
swe.description: Focused on core software patterns, algorithmic optimization, and modular component structures. I construct systems with a strict emphasis on SOLID principles, testing coverages, and clean architecture.
swe.featuredDescription: Object-oriented and functional paradigm engineering, standard patterns integration, and performance benchmarking.

backend.title: Backend Engineer
backend.subTitle: Designing High-Throughput APIs and Distributed Architectures
backend.description: Specialized in server-side frameworks, relational/non-relational database architectures, edge caching layers, and containerized cloud services. I engineer services with high availability and low latency.
backend.featuredDescription: API design (REST/GraphQL), query plan optimization, caching strategies, and secure database migrations.

fullstack.title: Full Stack Developer
fullstack.subTitle: Crafting Seamless, High-Performance End-to-End Solutions
fullstack.description: Bridging the gap between robust serverless architecture and visually polished, responsive user interfaces. I implement modular state flows, CSS layout frameworks, and secure API bridges.
fullstack.featuredDescription: State machine synchronization, responsive UI design, edge routing middlewares, and automated test coverages.

wordpress.title: WordPress Engineer
wordpress.subTitle: Architecting Custom CMS Engines and Headless Implementations
wordpress.description: Dedicated to professional WordPress development including decoupled Gutenberg blocks, complex custom plugins, database fine-tuning, and headless Next.js query layers.
wordpress.featuredDescription: Custom plugin lifecycle hooks, Gutenberg block development, headless GraphQL integrations, and WP REST API caching.
